title: SRE: 502 Bad Gateway Incident Response
description: The portal intermittently returns 502 Bad Gateway. SRE Agent must: 1. Hard kill all lingering 'next' and 'node' processes on port 3000. 2. Remove any stale .next/dev/lock files. 3. Verify stability by polling /api/config for 30 seconds after relaunch. 4. Proof: Verify 200 OK from local curl and external bestfam.us.
